name: Setup OIDC Client
description: Create or retrieve an OIDC client application in Zitadel. Outputs oidc_issuer_url, oidc_client_id, and oidc_client_secret as template variables. Runs on PVE host before container start so credentials are available to pre_start templates.

parameters.name: Zitadel Host
parameters.description: Hostname of the Zitadel instance (resolved via dependency)

parameters.name: Shared Volume Path
parameters.description: Path to the shared volume mount point on PVE host

parameters.name: OIDC Application Name
parameters.description: Name of the OIDC application in Zitadel (defaults to hostname)

parameters.name: OIDC Issuer URL
parameters.description: Optional: External OIDC issuer URL (e.g. https://auth.example.com). If empty, defaults to internal Zitadel URL.

parameters.name: Zitadel PAT
parameters.description: Short-lived Zitadel access token (injected by backend in zero-secret mode). Falls back to admin-client.pat file if not set.
